skills.name: Extract job description
skills.description: Extracts and cleans the job description from raw scraped web text or URL. Use when the user provides a job URL or pastes messy job listing text.

skills.name: Tailor resume
skills.description: Tailors the candidate's resume to a specific job description while preserving facts and voice. Use when the user wants to tailor their resume for a job.

skills.name: Tailor resume (light)
skills.description: Minimal, targeted improvements to a resume for a job. Use when the user wants light tailoring only.

skills.name: Tailor resume (medium)
skills.description: Moderate tailoring of a resume for a job. Use when the user wants medium tailoring.

skills.name: Tailor resume (heavy)
skills.description: Comprehensive tailoring of a resume for a job. Use when the user wants heavy tailoring.

skills.name: Evaluate job fit
skills.description: Evaluates how well a resume matches a job description. Use when the user wants a fit score and recommendations.

skills.name: Improve resume quality
skills.description: Applies specific content improvements to a resume. Use when the user has a list of improvements to apply.
